story_title: 場地白模產生器 (階段一)
current_task: [FRONTEND] 3D 檢視器整合:orbit controls 旋轉/縮放,2D 編輯與 3D 預覽切換流程
notes: Floor-plan direction. Tasks 1-4 committed (8401ee2, 20747d7, b4f1db9, 69e825e, 1426911). Task 5 (LAST task of this story) implemented per architect-plan.md and passed review (0 critical/should-fix), then QA iteration 1 found 1 High bug via independent live-browser probing: PlanEditor.tsx's outer wrapper div (data-testid="plan-editor") kept tabIndex=0 + onKeyDown={handleKeyDown} across BOTH step-edit and step-preview (never unmounted/rescoped on step switch), and selectedObject/selectedVertex were never reset by handleNextStep/handleBackToEdit. Repro: select a wall in Step 1 -> click 下一步 -> click anywhere on the 3D canvas (or simply focus the 返回編輯 button) -> press Delete -> click 返回編輯 -> the wall was silently gone from walls state, with zero on-screen feedback. Fix applied (both of QA's suggested directions, applied together as defense-in-depth): (1) handleNextStep() now also calls setSelectedObject(null)/setSelectedVertex(null), matching the existing handleModeChange clear-on-transition pattern; (2) tabIndex/onKeyDown moved off the outer plan-editor wrapper onto the inner step-edit container div, so the keydown listener structurally does not exist while Step 2 is mounted, regardless of any stale selection. PlanEditorPage.ts's pressDelete() updated to focus stepEdit instead of editor. Added 2 new permanent regression tests to venue-3d-scene.spec.ts reproducing QA's exact Method A (click 3D canvas) and Method B (focus 返回編輯 button) repro paths. Review iteration 2 independently re-derived the JSX, re-ran the full Playwright suite (55/55 green) against a live local dev server, confirmed eslint/tsc clean, and APPROVED (0 critical/should-fix, 1 non-blocking Consider note re: selection highlight cosmetic side effect). QA iteration 2 independently re-verified Bug 1's fix via live-browser testing, no new bugs found, APPROVED -- QA sign-off granted. Playwright final gate (this pass): re-ran the full venue suite fresh against a real local dev server (npm run dev): `npx playwright test venue-plan-editor.spec.ts venue-objects.spec.ts venue-dimensions.spec.ts venue-3d-scene.spec.ts` -> 55/55 passed (venue-plan-editor 9 + venue-objects 17 + venue-dimensions 16 + venue-3d-scene 13, counts verified by reading spec files, matching QA's reported breakdown). Cross-checked every Clarified Acceptance Criterion in orchestrator-output.md against test coverage: all DOM-assertable ACs (Step 1 default/Step 2 unmounted, next-step disabled/enabled, generate+advance, back-to-edit intact, regenerate-on-edit replaces stale meshes, data-orbit-controls attribute present) have passing dedicated tests; the 3 manual-only ACs (orbit drag rotation, maxPolarAngle floor clamp, min/maxDistance zoom clamp) are documented as a checklist in manual-tests/venue-plan-editor.md per the confirmed testability split -- full coverage, nothing missing. checkpoints.playwright=completed, stage=complete. This was the LAST task of the story 場地白模產生器 (階段一) -- all 5 tasks now checked off in stories/venue-whitebox-generator.md, and the story's 驗收條件 section was sanity-checked against the cumulative build (2D editor, object system, dimensions, 3D whitebox generation, orbit controls + step wizard) -- all satisfied. Feature code + pipeline records committed together in the same commit per this story's established convention. Notion: task card 場地白模-3D檢視器整合 synced to 已完成, AND parent story row 場地白模產生器 (階段一) in Stories database also synced to 已完成 per AGENTS.md last-task-of-story rule.
